goal: Close BUG-0012: component-level monthly bucket attribution (DEC-0067) so Income and Fixed forecast buckets reflect categorized recurring inflows/outflows; operator verify AG/AH on financegnome.omniflow.cc after deploy + recompute.
scope: AH1: RecurringPattern.category_id carry + recurring bucket path (Fixed)
AG1: Income from categorized recurring inflows via component monthly_map
T1: Unit tests for monthly_map component attribution (AG/AH)
D1: Remove/retire net-delta categorize_delta for monthly buckets
V1: verify-work prep + runbook TOML checklist for German/custom categories
risks: Omniflow Firefly categories may use German/custom labels absent from default TOML — operator must extend [forecast.category_buckets] before V1
Variable totals shrink when fixed recurring moves to Fixed — intended DEC-0007 behavior; regression test required
Full Firefly sync + forecast recompute required before V1 probes
No frontend changes — cards already bind API fields; fix is projection write path only

operator_gates.description: Manual Full Firefly sync + forecast recompute after deploy — required before V1 AG/AH probes
If AG/AH fail on label mismatch, operator extends [forecast.category_buckets] in TOML for non-English category names (Gehalt, Miete Nebenkosten, etc.) per runbook checklist

AG.verify: Monthly forecast Income non-zero when mirror holds income-category recurring inflows in forecast month

AH.verify: Monthly forecast Fixed non-zero when mirror holds fixed-cost category recurring outflows

deploy_order: AH1 + AG1 + T1 + D1 single PR
Operator manual Full Firefly sync + forecast recompute
Operator TOML extend if German/custom labels miss default keys
V1 verify-work smoke rows AG/AH + regression footer
